title: cephaelis peduncularis var. hypsophila
intro: Cephaelis peduncularis var. hypsophila, also known as a variety of the Ipecacuanha plant, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant and emetic actions, used to treat coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cephaelis peduncularis var. hypsophila include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of a root extract, have been used in various forms, including capsules, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate symptoms.
